parameters.subject: Payment Confirmation - AB & Co. Legal
parameters.emailHtml:
Payment Confirmation

Dear {{ $json.clientName }},

We have received your payment.

AmountRs.{{ $json.amount }}
Method{{ $json.method }}
Reference{{ $json.referenceNumber || 'N/A' }}

Please retain this email as your payment confirmation.

Best regards,
AB & Co. Legal

parameters.subject: Payment Received - {{ $json.amount }}
parameters.message: Payment received from {{ $json.clientName }}. Amount: Rs.{{ $json.amount }} via {{ $json.method }}. Reference: {{ $json.referenceNumber || 'N/A' }}
